posts.title: RE: REVALIDATION OF NHIA ENROLMENT WITH NIN
posts.body:
The National Health Insurance Authority, Osun State vide its letter to Management on 5th March, 2026 has requested that all employees in the formal sector should update/revalidate their NHIA details with their NIN on or before 10th April,2026.



In view of the above, Management has directed that all employees of this Institution who are NHIA enrollees should complete the enrolment revalidation through a google form, to revalidate/update their NHIA enrolment with their National Identification Number (NIN) before the given deadline.



The link to the google form to be completed by all NHIA enrollees is indicated below:



https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeD8UK0K9956gFG2rQCY2cFcIQEkuTF7SrZ_nH5GgIlxPR6pg/viewform?usp=header



Kindly convey the content of this message to the sufficient notice of all staff in your department/unit for compliance.



Thank you. 



e-signed

Abiodun Oyamakinde,

Assistant Director of Administration

Head, NHIA.

posts.title: NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE AUTHORITY (NHIA) ENROLLEES ELIGIBILITY STATUS
posts.body:
In furtherance of the effort of the Management to integrate the operations of NHIA on the Electronic Health Record (E-HR) in the hospital, it has become imperative for all NHIA enrollees to complete a goggle form so as to confirm their eligibility status towards ensuring uninterrupted access to health insurance services at the hospital units of this institution. The link to the goggle form is indicated below:



https://tinyurl.com/NHIA2026

All enrollees are therefore advised to confirm their eligibility status on or before 7th April, 2026, to enable NHIA activate their accessibility to healthcare services accordingly. 

Kindly note that the exercise is one – off (non- repeatable) for each enrollee.

Thank you.	



e-signed:

AbiodunOyamakinde,

Assistant Director of Administration

Head, NHIA Department

posts.body: Delta raises doctors’ pay by N200,000, gives reason
